register.note: Full-width composed strip with the dashed t=0.50 line as a dead-center focal anchor — poster-worthy and the page's face, just busier than the exemplar's single-object calm.

Shows the whole classification mechanism in one frame — threshold rule splitting decision regions, points by predicted probability, red-ringed misclassifications, plus confusion matrix and precision/recall.
Self-labels (t=0.50 BALANCED, predict 0/1, READING THE DECISION, ACTUAL/PRED TP/FP/FN/TN with plain-English glosses).
Distill-soft warm surface, soft borders, crisp anti-aliased marks; held off 4 by a flat field below the strip and a dead gutter right of the Run matrix.
A docked decision-threshold slider live re-counts the matrix and moves precision/recall/accuracy/F1, plus the single hero load-motion.
prediction=blue, truth=gold, error=red used only as misclassification rings and FP/FN tints (no all-red dilution), AA-tinted prose terms.

hero.note: Full-width probability strip + threshold split + confusion matrix/precision-recall — the full mechanism in one frame, legible as a thumbnail via the centered t=0.50 line.

assessment.note: Closing transfer is an open prompt ('a case you haven't seen'), not another MCQ.

verdict.summary: Clears register 3 across all six dimensions with a genuine mechanism-bearing hero.
